name: context-gardener
description: Keep long Codex tasks precise with VCC checkpoints, observation masking, and bounded pruning.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long Codex tasks precise and lean.
interface.longDescription: Context Gardener combines structured VCC checkpoints, deterministic masking of oversized tool observations, and bounded state pruning for long-running and multi-agent Codex work.
defaultPrompt: Use Context Gardener to keep this long task precise and lean.
Create a VCC checkpoint before delegating this work.
Mask large observations and keep only actionable evidence.
